title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 01 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 01 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 01 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/08/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in the doldrums, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 783, down 0.19% for the day.Traders sold goods according to market conditions. As the weekend approached, steel mills' purchase willingness weakened somewhat. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
